case_title: DANITRA SAMPSON VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-23-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-23-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAMPSON, DANITRA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THE LIABILITY OF DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SAMPSON, DANITRA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-09-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-11-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE RICHARD ULMER. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAMPSON, DANITRA HEARING SET FOR APR-20-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING .PLAINTIFF CLAIMED THAT DEFENDANT WAS ALREADY SERVED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAMPSON, DANITRA

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SET FOR APR-20-2010 IS CONTINUED PER THE REQUEST OF THE PARTIES FOR A PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-25-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPY FURNISHED THE COURT OF LETTER OF DENIAL SENT TO THE PLAINTIFF ON CLAIM AGAINST THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DANITRA SAMPSON IS GRANTED.
